title: 11 Top-Rated Herbal Tinctures for Hypothyroidism Symptoms
description: Astragalus membranaceus tincture may help people with hypothyroidism because it contains active compounds that support thyroid health. This herb is traditionally used in Chinese medicine to boost energy and metabolism, which can be low in people with hypothyroidism. Astragalus tincture may help to reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland, which can contribute to hypothyroidism. It also contains antioxidants that protect the thyroid gland from damage caused by free radicals. Additionall...
